capabilities.operation: Evaluate every canonical and effective Prompt Kit prompt for complete, actionable, non-lazy language and emit one disposition per prompt.
capabilities.proof_ceiling: Exhaustive static registry and effective-prompt language proof; no provider compliance proof.

capabilities.operation: Install executable correctness, routing, regression, performance, cost, and token-efficiency evals for a target skill and repair valid weaknesses.
capabilities.proof_ceiling: Depends on the eval lanes actually executed; static, model, runtime, and production proof must remain distinct.

capabilities.operation: Factor skill ownership into deterministic reusable boundaries without moving application behavior into prose.
capabilities.proof_ceiling: Static ownership and routing proof until model or runtime evals are executed.

capabilities.operation: Clone or clean-fast-forward main, validate the Prompt Kit, and open the selected technician surface.
outputs: opened Prompt Kit website or generator GUI
capabilities.proof_ceiling: Source and contract proof until native Windows acquisition and browser behavior are observed.
